extracted_items.content: Project name is 'taskflow-api' — a REST API backend for a task management app
User prefers uv for package management over pip or poetry due to superior speed
Tech stack decision: FastAPI web framework, PostgreSQL database, SQLAlchemy ORM, Pydantic v2 for data validation, Alembic for migrations
Project structure: app/ contains main.py, models/, schemas/, routers/, services/, and db.py; separate alembic/ and tests/ directories; business logic kept in services, not route handlers
Testing requirements: pytest with pytest-asyncio for async tests, httpx for testing FastAPI endpoints, minimum 80% test coverage requirement
Deployment strategy: Docker with multi-stage builds to minimize image size, deployed to Fly.io
CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions: run ruff linting, pytest with coverage checks, build Docker image on main branch
User selecting Pydantic v2 for performance improvements, aware of breaking changes around validators (@validator → @field_validator, @model_validator)
